## ZXTouch Rootless

System-wide touch simulation for **iOS 15-16**. Supports Dopamine (rootless) and Roothide/Serotonin.

### Features
- Touch simulation (up to 19 fingers)
- Python script automation
- Image matching (no OpenCV)
- OCR via Vision framework
- Color picker & searcher
- Text input & keyboard control
- iOS Shortcuts integration
- Dark mode

### Requirements
- iOS 15.0 - 16.6.1
- Dopamine or Roothide jailbreak
- Python 3 from Procursus recommended; bundled fallback available

## v0.08.24
- Package version 0.1.1 for repo installs
- Panel script settings now remember their enabled state
- Fixed repeat/speed/interval leakage when panel settings are disabled
- Hardened Python runtime setup with rootless paths and bundled fallback
- Fixed false Script Error alerts after successful Python scripts

## v0.08.1
- Improved script list UI and settings
- Added separate Python/raw script indicators
- Moved bundled examples into a dedicated examples folder
- Added script registry metadata
- Added lightweight syntax highlighting in the editor
- Added script input prompts through `device.prompt_input(...)`
- Shows README files inside script folders
- Hardened script log helper creation
- Improved touch indicator behavior in portrait-locked apps

## v0.08
- Full roothide (Serotonin) support
- image_match working via Accelerate.framework
- iOS Shortcuts integration fixed
- insert_text / keyboard control working
- Python 3.9+ auto-detection & setup
- Restored log format with timestamps
- Touch indicator orientation fix
